creator: wbe@psr.com
text:
I don't know if it's an oversight or intentional, but as of upgrading from 14.0 to 14.1 in early June, xf86-video-mga has been absent from the pkg repository.  I just checked again, and it's still absent.

In the best case, it's absent because it's known not to work and will reappear once it's been fixed, but there may be a testing issue: a patch was posted in Comment #29 which I'd be happy to test once it comes out via pkg, but I think the developers want someone to get the source from ports, apply the patch, build it all, install, and test it and confirm it works first.
